hero.alt: Amenities and privileged location of Monte da Estrada
hero.title: Location and Amenities

title: Location and How to Get Here
description: Monte da Estrada is located on the coast of Alentejo, near Zambujeira do Mar, in a privileged location between the countryside and the sea.

fromLisbon.title: From Lisbon
route: Leave Lisbon via A2 heading South
Take the exit for Santiago do Cacém/Sines
Continue on N393 towards Zambujeira do Mar
Follow signs to Monte da Estrada

fromFaro.title: From Faro
route: Leave Faro via A22 towards Lagos
Follow signs to Monte da Estrada

fromPorto.title: From Porto
route: Leave Porto via A1 towards Lisbon
Pass Lisbon and continue on A2 South

publicTransport.title: Public Transport
publicTransport.description: Access by public transport is limited. We recommend using your own vehicle.

options.description: Rede Expressos to Odemira, followed by taxi or transfer (to be arranged)
Linha do Sul to Funcheira, followed by bus or taxi
Transfer service available upon prior arrangement (additional cost)

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Private and free parking available for all guests.

tips.title: Useful Tips
items: GPS: Use coordinates for more precise navigation
Fuel: Fill up in Odemira or Zambujeira do Mar
Supermarket: Available in Zambujeira do Mar and Odemira
Pharmacy: Zambujeira do Mar and Odemira
ATM: Zambujeira do Mar and Odemira
